testcase.name: receives events from auction server after joining
stops receiving events from auction server after failure
testcase.failure: java.util.ConcurrentModificationException at java.base/java.util.ArrayList$Itr.checkForComodification(ArrayList.java:1012) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList$Itr.next(ArrayList.java:966) at uk.org.lidalia.kotlinlangext.notifiers.Notifier.notify(Notifier.kt:12) at
